commands: cargo run -- --config-dir <tmp>/c --state-dir <tmp>/s --provider mock game install dev mc1.20.1-fabric --yes
cargo run -- --config-dir <tmp>/c --state-dir <tmp>/s --provider mock game install ng mc-neoforge --yes --dry-run
cargo run -- --config-dir <tmp>/c --state-dir <tmp>/s --provider mock game install ng2 mc1.21.1-neoforge-21.1.172 --yes --dry-run
cargo run -- --config-dir <tmp>/c --state-dir <tmp>/s --provider mock game install dev mc1.20.1 --yes && cargo run -- --config-dir <tmp>/c --state-dir <tmp>/s --provider mock game remove dev --yes

description: Fixed 2 Atlas-identified gaps: (1) replaced fs::write with download_file+MockGameFetcher for game artifact writes, (2) persisted loader_version in GameRecord metadata and game_info display

commands: cargo run -- --config-dir <tmp>/c --state-dir <tmp>/s game install dev mc1.20.1 --yes
cargo run -- --config-dir <tmp>/c --state-dir <tmp>/s game runtime info dev
cargo run -- --config-dir <tmp>/c --state-dir <tmp>/s game runtime install dev --system --yes

description: Added Java version verification: parse_java_version_output + probe_java_version for user/system Java path version probing; version marker sidecar for managed runtime; wrong-major user config produces actionable error; wrong-major system Java falls through to managed install

cleanup: all temp dirs cleaned, no lingering processes

description: Wired launch-on-install confirmation: pkg_install now calls require_confirmation(OperationKind::LaunchOnInstall, yes) when pkg.launch.is_some(). Added 5 integration tests (RED→GREEN proof). Download-only intentionally does not trigger launch gate.
